code:
import{jsPDF}from'jspdf';import i18next from'i18next';/**
 * 证书生成服务 - 用于创建可下载的证书PDF
 */class CertificateGenerator{/**
   * 根据证书数据生成PDF证书
   * @param {Object} certificate - 证书数据
   * @returns {Promise<Blob>} 返回PDF Blob
   */static generateCertificatePDF(certificate){return new Promise((resolve,reject)=>{try{// 获取当前语言
const currentLanguage=i18next.language;const isEnglish=currentLanguage==='en'||currentLanguage.startsWith('en-');// 创建PDF文档 (A4横向)
const doc=new jsPDF({orientation:'landscape',unit:'mm',format:'a4'});// 设置文档属性
doc.setProperties({title:`${certificate.name} - ${isEnglish&&certificate.english_course?certificate.english_course:certificate.course} Certificate`,subject:'Stratford International University Certificate',author:'Stratford International University',keywords:'certificate, education, diploma',creator:'SIU Certificate System'});// 添加水印
this.addWatermark(doc);// 加载证书SVG作为背景并处理后续操作
this.loadSVGBackground(doc,certificate).then(()=>{// 添加证书详细信息
this.addCertificateDetails(/* doc, certificate */);// 添加QR码 (用于验证)
this.addVerificationQR(/* doc, certificate */);// 生成PDF并返回
const pdfBlob=doc.output('blob');resolve(pdfBlob);}).catch(error=>{console.error('加载SVG背景失败:',error);reject(error);});}catch(error){console.error('PDF生成错误:',error);reject(error);}});}/**
   * 对外公开的下载证书方法
   * @param {Object} certificate - 证书数据
   * @returns {Promise<boolean>} 下载是否成功
   */static async downloadCertificate(certificate){try{// 从内存中获取处理好的SVG
let svgImage;if(certificate.processedImage&&certificate.processedImage.startsWith('blob:')){const response=await fetch(certificate.processedImage);svgImage=await response.text();}else{// 如果没有处理好的图像，获取原始SVG并处理
const response=await fetch(certificate.image);let svgText=await response.text();// 替换占位符
svgText=svgText.replace(/\[RECIPIENT NAME\]/g,certificate.name);svgText=svgText.replace(/\[DATE\]/g,certificate.date);svgText=svgText.replace(/\[CERTIFICATE-ID\]/g,certificate.certificateId);svgText=svgText.replace(/\[PROGRAM\/DEGREE\]/g,certificate.course);svgText=svgText.replace(/\[HASH\]/g,'SIU-'+Math.random().toString(36).substring(2,10).toUpperCase());svgImage=svgText;}// 创建blob和URL用于下载
const blob=new Blob([svgImage],{type:'image/svg+xml'});const svgUrl=URL.createObjectURL(blob);// 为转换创建一个图像元素
const img=new Image();// 创建PDF时增加证书高级样式，等待图像加载完成
return new Promise((resolve,reject)=>{img.onload=function(){try{// 创建一个新的PDF A4大小
const pdf=new jsPDF({orientation:'landscape',unit:'mm',format:'a4'});// 添加专业背景
pdf.setFillColor(252,252,250);pdf.rect(0,0,pdf.internal.pageSize.getWidth(),pdf.internal.pageSize.getHeight(),'F');// 添加浅色水印背景
pdf.setTextColor(240,240,245);pdf.setFontSize(60);pdf.setFont('helvetica','bold','normal');pdf.text('STRATFORD',pdf.internal.pageSize.getWidth()/2,70,{align:'center',angle:45,opacity:0.1});pdf.text('UNIVERSITY',pdf.internal.pageSize.getWidth()/2,100,{align:'center',angle:45,opacity:0.1});// 添加装饰性边框
const pageWidth=pdf.internal.pageSize.getWidth();const pageHeight=pdf.internal.pageSize.getHeight();// 绘制金色边框
pdf.setDrawColor(173,151,79);// 金色
pdf.setLineWidth(1);pdf.rect(10,10,pageWidth-20,pageHeight-20,'S');// 绘制第二层边框
pdf.setDrawColor(0,48,135);// 深蓝色
pdf.setLineWidth(0.5);pdf.rect(15,15,pageWidth-30,pageHeight-30,'S');// 计算PDF内的图像尺寸和位置
const imgWidth=pageWidth-40;const imgHeight=img.height*imgWidth/img.width;const x=20;const y=(pageHeight-imgHeight)/2;// 将SVG添加到PDF
pdf.addImage(img.src,'SVG',x,y,imgWidth,imgHeight);// 添加专业印章 (圆形金色)
const stampX=pageWidth-60;const stampY=pageHeight-40;// 绘制印章圆圈
pdf.setDrawColor(173,151,79);// 金色
pdf.setLineWidth(0.7);pdf.circle(stampX,stampY,15,'S');// 绘制内圈
pdf.setDrawColor(173,151,79);pdf.setLineWidth(0.3);pdf.circle(stampX,stampY,13,'S');// 添加印章文字
pdf.setTextColor(173,151,79);pdf.setFontSize(5);pdf.text('OFFICIAL',stampX,stampY-5,{align:'center'});pdf.text('UNIVERSITY',stampX,stampY,{align:'center'});pdf.text('SEAL',stampX,stampY+5,{align:'center'});// 底部添加防伪提示
pdf.setTextColor(100,100,100);pdf.setFontSize(6);pdf.text('This document contains multiple security features and can be verified at verify.stratford-university.edu',pageWidth/2,pageHeight-5,{align:'center'});// 保存PDF
pdf.save(`${certificate.name}-${certificate.certificateId}.pdf`);// 清理
URL.revokeObjectURL(svgUrl);resolve(true);}catch(error){console.error('Error generating PDF:',error);reject(error);}};img.onerror=function(){console.error('Failed to load image');reject(new Error('Failed to load certificate image'));};img.src=svgUrl;});}catch(error){console.error('Error downloading certificate:',error);return false;}}/**
   * 添加水印
   * @param {jsPDF} doc - jsPDF文档实例
   */static addWatermark(doc){// 设置水印颜色和透明度
doc.setTextColor(200,200,200);doc.setGState(new doc.GState({opacity:0.2}));// 添加水印文本
doc.setFontSize(60);doc.text('Stratford International University',150,105,{align:'center',angle:45});// 重置透明度
doc.setGState(new doc.GState({opacity:1}));doc.setTextColor(0,0,0);}/**
   * 加载SVG证书模板作为背景
   * @param {jsPDF} doc - jsPDF文档实例
   * @param {Object} certificate - 证书数据
   */static async loadSVGBackground(doc,certificate){return new Promise((resolve,reject)=>{try{// 获取当前语言
const currentLanguage=i18next.language;const isEnglish=currentLanguage==='en'||currentLanguage.startsWith('en-');// 创建图像对象
const img=new Image();// 获取SVG内容并替换占位符
fetch(certificate.processedImage||certificate.image).then(response=>response.text()).then(svgText=>{// 替换SVG中的占位符
svgText=svgText.replace(/\[RECIPIENT NAME\]/g,certificate.name);svgText=svgText.replace(/\[DATE\]/g,certificate.date);svgText=svgText.replace(/\[CERTIFICATE-ID\]/g,certificate.certificateId);// 根据当前语言选择课程名称和描述
const courseTitle=isEnglish&&certificate.english_course?certificate.english_course:certificate.course;const courseDescription=isEnglish&&certificate.english_description?certificate.english_description:certificate.description;svgText=svgText.replace(/\[PROGRAM\/DEGREE\]/g,courseTitle);svgText=svgText.replace(/\[PROGRAM_DESCRIPTION\]/g,courseDescription);// 随机生成一个哈希作为区块链验证码
const hash='SIU-'+Math.random().toString(36).substring(2,10).toUpperCase();svgText=svgText.replace(/\[HASH\]/g,hash);// 创建SVG数据URL
const svgBlob=new Blob([svgText],{type:'image/svg+xml'});const url=URL.createObjectURL(svgBlob);// 设置图像源
img.onload=function(){// 添加图像作为背景
doc.addImage(img,'SVG',0,0,297,210);// 释放URL对象
URL.revokeObjectURL(url);resolve();};img.onerror=function(error){URL.revokeObjectURL(url);reject(error);};img.src=url;}).catch(reject);}catch(error){reject(error);}});}/**
   * 添加证书详细信息
   * @param {Object} certificate - 证书数据
   */static addCertificateDetails(/* doc, certificate */){// 在合适的位置添加额外的证书信息
// 注意：大部分信息已经包含在SVG模板中
}/**
   * 添加验证QR码
   * @param {Object} certificate - 证书数据
   */static addVerificationQR(/* doc, certificate */){// 为证书添加验证QR码
// 这里可以实现实际的QR码生成逻辑
}// 创建增强版证书SVG模板
static generateEnhancedCertificateTemplate(certificateData){// 这里是生成高质量SVG证书模板的基础代码
const{name,course,date,certificateId}=certificateData;// 证书SVG模板
return`
    <svg width="900" height="650" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
      <!-- 背景层 -->
      <rect width="900" height="650" fill="#FFFEF9" />
      
      <!-- 装饰性边框 -->
      <rect x="20" y="20" width="860" height="610" stroke="#AA9651" stroke-width="3" fill="none" />
      <rect x="30" y="30" width="840" height="590" stroke="#003087" stroke-width="1.5" fill="none" />
      
      <!-- 水印背景图案 -->
      <g opacity="0.05">
        <path d="M450,150 L500,200 L450,250 L400,200 Z" fill="#003087" transform="rotate(45, 450, 200)" />
        <text x="450" y="325" font-family="Times New Roman" font-size="60" fill="#003087" text-anchor="middle" transform="rotate(-30, 450, 325)">STRATFORD</text>
        <text x="450" y="375" font-family="Times New Roman" font-size="60" fill="#003087" text-anchor="middle" transform="rotate(-30, 450, 375)">UNIVERSITY</text>
      </g>
      
      <!-- 证书顶部标题 -->
      <text x="450" y="100" font-family="Times New Roman" font-size="36" font-weight="bold" fill="#003087" text-anchor="middle">STRATFORD INTERNATIONAL UNIVERSITY</text>
      
      <!-- 校徽 -->
      <circle cx="450" cy="150" r="50" fill="#F5F5F5" stroke="#AA9651" stroke-width="2" />
      <circle cx="450" cy="150" r="45" fill="#003087" />
      <text x="450" y="140" font-family="Times New Roman" font-size="14" fill="white" text-anchor="middle">STRATFORD</text>
      <text x="450" y="160" font-family="Times New Roman" font-size="14" fill="white" text-anchor="middle">UNIVERSITY</text>
      <text x="450" y="175" font-family="Times New Roman" font-size="10" fill="white" text-anchor="middle">FOUNDED 2005</text>
      
      <!-- 证书正文内容 -->
      <text x="450" y="250" font-family="Times New Roman" font-size="24" fill="#000000" text-anchor="middle">This is to certify that</text>
      <text x="450" y="300" font-family="Times New Roman" font-size="36" font-weight="bold" fill="#000000" text-anchor="middle">${name}</text>
      <text x="450" y="350" font-family="Times New Roman" font-size="20" fill="#000000" text-anchor="middle">has successfully completed the requirements for the degree of</text>
      <text x="450" y="400" font-family="Times New Roman" font-size="28" font-weight="bold" fill="#003087" text-anchor="middle">${course}</text>
      
      <!-- 颁发日期和签名栏 -->
      <line x1="300" y1="500" x2="450" y2="500" stroke="#000000" stroke-width="1" />
      <line x1="550" y1="500" x2="700" y2="500" stroke="#000000" stroke-width="1" />
      <text x="375" y="525" font-family="Times New Roman" font-size="14" fill="#000000" text-anchor="middle">Dr. Elizabeth Stratford</text>
      <text x="375" y="545" font-family="Times New Roman" font-size="14" fill="#000000" text-anchor="middle">University President</text>
      <text x="625" y="525" font-family="Times New Roman" font-size="14" fill="#000000" text-anchor="middle">Prof. Robert Chen</text>
      <text x="625" y="545" font-family="Times New Roman" font-size="14" fill="#000000" text-anchor="middle">Dean, School of Business</text>
      
      <!-- 证书底部 -->
      <text x="450" y="580" font-family="Times New Roman" font-size="16" fill="#000000" text-anchor="middle">Issued on ${date}</text>
      <text x="450" y="605" font-family="Times New Roman" font-size="16" fill="#000000" text-anchor="middle">Certificate ID: ${certificateId}</text>
      <text x="450" y="630" font-family="Times New Roman" font-size="12" fill="#555555" text-anchor="middle">Blockchain Verification: SIU-7FE9TTGH</text>
    </svg>
    `;}}export default CertificateGenerator;
